environment.gpu: not used; CPU-only C# rule/event-sequence search

splitPolicy.synthetic: scenario/family deterministic split: train/validation/test; full families held out where possible
splitPolicy.note: Step07 keeps Step06 dataset and performs deeper runtime-safe rule/event search without distillation.
